name: Asymmetric Support Entry
description: Enter near structural support before full confirmation when location + R:R justify controlled risk.
experimentHypothesis: Entering near structural support before full confirmation produces better expectancy than waiting for confirmation — when confirmation cost would push R:R below Stock File minimum.
principles: Confirmation has an economic cost — not free
Evaluate thesis quality AND opportunity quality separately
More confirmation ≠ better trade if R:R deteriorates
Location evidence may justify probe before full confirmation evidence
Setup stop ≠ thesis invalidation — do not manufacture R:R with tight stops
Single stock outcome does not prove or disprove this playbook
checklist: Stock File zone defined with minimum R:R
Price inside or near planned strategic zone
Current R:R meets Stock File minimum
Estimated R:R after confirmation still acceptable OR probe authorized
Setup stop defined (not thesis invalidation unless intentional)
Probe or single entry — no false add ladder unless levels exist
